untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'consecutive limit-up days' and 'positive expected value assessment' — neither are standard indicators. Limit moves and consecutive bar patterns require custom logic beyond the allowed indicator set. The core mechanic (avoid entries after 2+ consecutive limit-ups) cannot be expressed using only OHLCV and technical indicators without custom bar-sequence counters.
translation_notes: Attempted to capture reversion logic using limit-bid proxy (close near lower Bollinger Band) and reversal target (pivot R1), but the signal's essential feature — counting consecutive limit moves and dynamically disabling entries based on that count — requires untranslatable state tracking. A production implementation would need a custom consecutive_limit_up_counter and conditional entry gate.
